title: Can't see items assigned to me in My Work
excerpt: I can’t see items assigned to me in My Work. I also don’t see any boards when I click on “Customize.” What am I doing wrong? This feature works with old boards, but it will not work today.

posts.author: Lesli (Lesli Laughter)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t see items assigned to me in My Work. I also don’t see any boards when I click on “Customize.” What am I doing wrong? This feature works with old boards, but it will not work today.
